name: Swiss Chocolate Crispies
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cake mix, Crisco, butter, eggs, and water in a large bowl.
2. Beat at low speed with an electric mixer for 2 minutes.
3. Fold in 1 cup of cereal.
4. Refrigerate for 1 hour.
5. Crush the remaining 2 cups of cereal into coarse crumbs.
6. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
7. Grease baking sheets.
8. Shape the dough into 1-inch balls.
9. Roll each ball in crushed cereal.
10. Place on baking sheets about 1 inch apart.
11. Bake at 350°F for 11 to 13 minutes.
12. Cool for 1 minute on baking sheets.
13. Transfer to a cooling rack.
